<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\Types; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Type; /** * Value Object representing the 'parent' type. * * Parent, as a Type, represents the parent class of class in which the associated element was defined. * * @psalm-immutable */ final class Parent_ implements Type { /** * Returns a rendered output of the Type as it would be used in a DocBlock. */ public function __toString(): string { return 'parent'; } }
